englishDefinitions: A playful or humorous term for an anniversary or date related to taking a plane, especially a flight-related milestone.
persianTranslation: مناسبتِ مربوط به سفر با هواپیما
examples: We celebrated our plane a versary with a weekend trip to Paris.
She jokingly called their first flight together a plane a versary.
They posted photos online to mark their plane a versary.
